title: Индикатори за биоразнообразие за Европейски фермерски системи
subtitle: Ръководство (Резюме)
description: A guide summarizing the EU FP7 BioBio project’s development of 23 scientifically tested indicators for measuring biodiversity in European farming systems. It presents methods to assess habitat, species, and genetic diversity alongside farm management practices to inform environmental monitoring and policy implementation.
